content.title: Privacy Policy
content.s1b: When you contact me through the form or email, I collect the information you provide: name, email, company, and your message.
content.s2b:
I use your information solely to:

  • Respond to your inquiries
  • Prepare service proposals
  • Project-related communications

I do not share your information with third parties or use it for unsolicited marketing.
content.s3b: This site does not use tracking cookies. GitHub Pages may generate anonymous access logs that are beyond my control.
content.s4b: You can request deletion of your data at any time by writing to freyre.dev@gmail.com.
